branches.description: Cascade Bearers esteem imagination, from the dreams of visionary magical theorists to the innovations of creative problem-solvers of all stripes.

generalFeat.name: Canny Acumen
generalFeat.description: At 8th level in this branch, you gain the Canny Acumen general feat. If you already have Canny Acumen, you gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice instead.

branchFeat6.name: Cascade Bearer's Flexibility
branchFeat6.description: Once per day, until the end of your turn, you gain a single druid or wizard metamagic feat with a level requirement of no more than half your level. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Cascade Bearers affiliation.

branchFeat10.name: Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting
branchFeat10.description: You can select halcyon spells from the divine or occult spell lists in addition to arcane or primal. You gain a halcyon cantrip and a halcyon 1st-level spell. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Cascade Bearers affiliation.

magicalParagon.name: Magical Paragon
magicalParagon.description: Nothing is beyond your imagination. Once per day, you can cast any common 7th-level spell from the arcane, divine, occult, or primal spell lists without expending a spell slot, using your halcyon spellcasting proficiency.

branches.description: Emerald Boughs emphasize camaraderie — community and connection to fellow Magaambyans. They interact with those outside the academy and spread its message.

generalFeat.name: Adopted Ancestry
generalFeat.description: At 8th level in this branch, you gain the Adopted Ancestry general feat. If you already have Adopted Ancestry, you gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice instead.

branchFeat6.name: Emerald Boughs Accustomation
branchFeat6.description: Requires expert in Society. When you Subsist in a settlement, a critical success improves your result by one step and a success grants a +2 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge about the settlement's culture. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Emerald Boughs affiliation.

branchFeat10.name: Emerald Boughs Hideaway
branchFeat10.description: You gain a personal extradimensional space to store items. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Emerald Boughs affiliation.

magicalParagon.name: Magical Paragon
magicalParagon.description: You can stretch your hideaway into a magnificent mansion for you and your allies. Spend 1 minute to enter and expand it; when you leave, remaining guests are expelled and it becomes a normal hideaway until you expand it again.

branches.description: Rain-Scribes value adaptability in thoughts and deeds, and a willingness to admit errors and learn from past mistakes.

generalFeat.name: Fleet
generalFeat.description: At 8th level in this branch, you gain the Fleet general feat. If you already have Fleet, you gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice instead.

branchFeat6.name: Rain-Scribe Sustenance
branchFeat6.description: You can sustain yourself with ambient magic instead of food and drink. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Rain-Scribes affiliation.

branchFeat10.name: Rain-Scribe Mobility
branchFeat10.description: Stride twice; you ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain, and clear those terrain effects from spaces you enter for 1 round. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Rain-Scribes affiliation.

magicalParagon.name: Magical Paragon
magicalParagon.description: You survive severe and extreme cold and heat without damage, move at full Speed through difficult and greater difficult terrain, take no damage from hazardous terrain, and when using Rain-Scribe Mobility you clear all three terrain types from spaces you enter for 1 round.

branches.description: Tempest-Sun Mages inspire valor — physical courage to stand up for friends and the school, and intellectual courage to consider opposing viewpoints.

generalFeat.name: Toughness
generalFeat.description: At 8th level in this branch, you gain the Toughness general feat. If you already have Toughness, you gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice instead.

branchFeat6.name: Tempest-Sun Absorption
branchFeat6.description: When you would take damage from a spell, you can use a reaction to reduce that damage by your level. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Tempest-Sun Mages affiliation.

branchFeat10.name: Tempest-Sun Shielding
branchFeat10.description: When you use Tempest-Sun Shielding, reduce triggering damage to you or an ally within 30 feet by four times the spell level. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Tempest-Sun Mages affiliation.

magicalParagon.name: Magical Paragon
magicalParagon.description: When you use Tempest-Sun Shielding, you can reduce the triggering damage to you and all allies within 30 feet by four times the spell level, rather than to you or a single ally.

branches.description: Uzunjati understand that knowledge lives in stories passed down through generations and is earned every day through personal experience.

generalFeat.name: Incredible Initiative
generalFeat.description: At 8th level in this branch, you gain the Incredible Initiative general feat. If you already have Incredible Initiative, you gain a 1st-level general feat of your choice instead.

branchFeat6.name: Uzunjati Storytelling
branchFeat6.description: You weave stories to captivate listeners and Recall Knowledge through narrative. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Uzunjati affiliation.

branchFeat10.name: Uzunjati Recollection
branchFeat10.description: Recall Knowledge using Performance or a branch-associated skill with a +2 circumstance bonus. Requires Magaambyan Attendant Dedication and Uzunjati affiliation.

magicalParagon.name: Magical Paragon
magicalParagon.description: When you use Uzunjati Recollection, you Recall Knowledge three times instead of once, each with a +2 circumstance bonus. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Uzunjati Storytelling from the combined narrative.
